# Rank Number 1 — by FourthWatch Tech

> AI-powered keyword research tool built for small business owners. Enter any keyword or URL and instantly get difficulty score, monthly search volume, search intent, cost per click, and a step-by-step AI-generated ranking plan. No monthly subscription — pay per use.

## What This Site Does

Rank Number 1 is a keyword research and SEO intelligence tool that helps small business owners, bloggers, and entrepreneurs rank higher on Google without paying for expensive enterprise SEO tools like Semrush or Ahrefs.

Core capabilities:
- Keyword analysis: difficulty (0–100), monthly search volume, search intent (informational/commercial/transactional/navigational), and CPC
- AI-generated ranking plan: specific, actionable steps tailored to the keyword
- URL analysis: paste any competitor URL to see estimated organic traffic, domain authority, top keywords, and content gaps
- Bulk keyword mode: analyze multiple keywords in one session
- Article generation: create SEO-optimized draft articles from keyword research

## Pricing

One-time credit purchases (no subscription, credits do not expire):
- Starter: $5 for 20 keyword credits
- Pro: $12.99 for 100 keyword credits
- Unlimited: $25 for 500 keyword credits

## Company

FourthWatch Tech — founded by an entrepreneur who mastered SEO and built the tool he always wished existed. Based on the belief that SEO intelligence should not require a $100+/month subscription.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://ranknumber1.com/): The keyword research tool — enter a keyword or URL to analyze
- [Blog](https://ranknumber1.com/blog): SEO guides and keyword research tips for small business owners
- [About](https://ranknumber1.com/about): The story behind FourthWatch Tech and Rank Number 1

## Blog Articles

- [Why SEO Tools Cost Too Much for Small Businesses](https://ranknumber1.com/blog/small-business-seo-tools-too-expensive): Compares Semrush, Ahrefs, and Rank Number 1 on price and features
- [How to Rank on Page 1 of Google Without an SEO Agency](https://ranknumber1.com/blog/rank-page-1-google-without-agency): Step-by-step guide for small business owners
- [Semrush vs Ahrefs vs Rank Number 1](https://ranknumber1.com/blog/semrush-vs-ahrefs-vs-rank-number-1): Honest feature and price comparison for small businesses
- [The Small Business Owner's Complete Keyword Research Guide](https://ranknumber1.com/blog/keyword-research-guide-small-business): How to find and target the right keywords
- [5 Keyword Research Mistakes That Kill Your Rankings](https://ranknumber1.com/blog/keyword-research-mistakes-killing-rankings): Common errors and how to fix them
- [How to Get More Customers from Google Without Paying for Ads](https://ranknumber1.com/blog/get-customers-google-without-ads): Organic SEO strategy for small businesses
- [Local SEO for Small Businesses](https://ranknumber1.com/blog/local-seo-small-business-guide): How to rank in Google Maps and local search

## Target Audience

Small business owners, solopreneurs, local service providers, bloggers, freelancers, and early-stage startups who want to rank on Google without an agency or enterprise-priced tools.

## Technical Notes

- Built with Next.js (App Router)
- Keyword data powered by AI analysis
- Authentication via Supabase magic link (email OTP)
- Payments via Stripe (one-time purchases)
- Sitemap: https://ranknumber1.com/sitemap.xml
